prompts.text: What part of this feels most exciting to you?
When you imagine exploring this together, what does that look like?
Is there a version of this that feels like the right starting point?
What would make this feel really good for both of you?
Has this been something you have been thinking about for a while, or is it newer?
What draws you toward this, even if you are not sure yet?
Is there a part of this that feels easier to imagine than others?
What would you want me to know about how you are thinking about it?
What would make exploring this feel comfortable for you?
Are there parts of this you are more curious about than others?
No rush here. Where would you want to start?
Is there something you would want to understand better before going further?
What would make this conversation feel easy?
What matters most to you about how this goes?
What would a comfortable first step look like for you?
